projects.name: luke-j.com
projects.description: Personal portfolio website built in React and TypeScript.

learnMore.name: luke-j.com
learnMore.info: Stores website data as a JSON, and dynamically generates the Single Page Application using React hooks.

projects.name: Loom By Light
projects.description: Arduino Application to assist with manual loom production of custom patterns.

learnMore.name: Loom by Light
learnMore.info: Loom by Light was a freelance project commissioned by a textile artist. The Arduino application was designed to run on low spec Arduinos. It converts bitmap images into rows of LED lights for tracking weaving on a custom manual loom.

projects.name: Fuzzy Kittens
projects.description: Web forums for cat lovers. Built in PHP

learnMore.name: Fuzzy Kittens
learnMore.info: Fuzzy Kittens was a group project for Algonquin College Computer Programming. I was the group leader and developed all of the back end, enabling CRUD operations for a message board. The back end was written in PHP, the front-end was written in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Science of Realms
projects.description: An award winning browser basedplatformer game built in Godot and GDScript.

learnMore.name: Science of Realms
learnMore.info: Find your way home by teleporting between realms, but beware of traps and enemies. This Game Jam entry was developed in Godot by a team of 6 and won an award for its excellent artwork.

projects.name: User Catalogue
projects.description: A browser based program tracking user profiles. uses Laravel RESTful back-end API, and separate React front-end.

learnMore.name: User Catalogue
learnMore.info: This Project features full CRUD operations, and has a separate back-end and front-end, allowing future deployment of front-end on different platforms. The repository features user authentication utilizing both session based for the web based front-end, and token based for RESTful API’s.

projects.name: Message Board
projects.description: A browser based message board. Uses Laravel and MySQL for back-end, with integrated React front-end.

learnMore.name: Message Board
learnMore.info: This message board features user authentication for CRUD operations, including user ownership of posts.

projects.name: Otherworldly Relics
projects.description: A browser based puzzle based game built using Unity and C#.

learnMore.name: Otherworldly Relics
learnMore.info: A Game Jam entry by a team of 3. A very short prototype of an in development hex tile puzzle game involving a devious occult plot, a gumshoe who will not put up with their shenanigans and multiple dimensions colliding in on itself!

projects.name: Loop Destroyer
projects.description: A browser based clicker game built in React and TypeScript.

learnMore.name: Loop Destroyer
learnMore.info: A Game Jam entry by a team of 3. Click the ball of elastics to break loops and gain points.  Buy upgrades for automatic loop breaking.  Higher tier upgrades break more loops per second but cost more.

projects.name: Spacelane Sweeper
projects.description: Clear the space lanes of debris in this browser based game, developed in Unity and C#.

learnMore.name: Spacelane Sweeper
learnMore.info: This Game Jam entry features 2D neutonian physics,multiple tools for destroying debris, and a complex physics system.

projects.name: Route Finder
projects.description: Web app for finding routes between two locations, and storing them in a database to minimize google maps API calls. Back-end built in PHP and MongoDB.

learnMore.name: Route Finder
learnMore.info: This was a group project for Algonquin College Computer Programming. I was in charge of developing the back-end business logic in PHP, including google maps API calls.  The front-end was developed in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: Perscription Management Tool
projects.description: A Jakarta EE program that handles back-end CRUD RESTful API requests for prescription management.

learnMore.name: Perscription Management Tool
learnMore.info: This was a group project for Algonquin College Computer Programming, my role was debugging the back end RESTful API calls.

projects.name: Physio App
projects.description: Member of an AGILE team that developed a physiotherapy app for a client using Node.js and AWS.

learnMore.name: Physio App
learnMore.info: This was the Capstone project for Algonquin College Computer Programming. Our team used agile practices for iterative development of the project. I was in charge of the back-end busieness logic.

projects.name: New York Crash Statistics Data Analysis
projects.description: Identified key factors that contribute to car accidents in New York City using Rapid Miner data modeling.

learnMore.name: New York Crash Statistics Data Analysis
learnMore.info: This was a group project for the Data Analysis and Business Intellegence course at Algonquin College. I was the group leader, and developed the Decision Tree and Random Forest data models, as well as merging the datasets together for analysis.

projects.name: Car sales app
projects.description: A Cross-Platform Flutter App for car sales, with multi-language support.

learnMore.name: Car sales app
learnMore.info: This wsa a group project for Algonquin College Moblie App Development. I was the group leader, and in charge of developing the page for tracking and creating car sales.

projects.name: 3D Space Sim
projects.description: A browser based mobile 3D space sim game currently in active development. Built using Three.js, React, and TypeScript.

learnMore.name: 3D Space Sim
learnMore.info: Control your ship in 3D space as you fly through the rings. This is my current passion project, and future plans involve Joystick support, customizable flight models, and more interesting game loops.

projects.name: Spell Shields Linear
projects.description: A browser based 2D game involving controlling range, and building units. React and TypeScript.

learnMore.name: Spell Shields Linear
learnMore.info: This game was intended to strech my abilities with React, and experiment with some ideas expading upon my previous passion project, "Rechrysalis".

projects.name: Rechrysalis
projects.description: A browser based 2D game involving moving a hero unit, and building follower units to destory enemies. Buit in Unity and C#

learnMore.name: Rechrysalis
learnMore.info: This was my passion project for 3 years before going to college. It involved many iterations and scope creep. I learned many lessons through it's development, and have applied them to more recent projects.
